HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ROSA LACAYO'S WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT BEING UNABLE TO EXAMINE APPLICANT RULED ON THE APPLICATION SUBMITTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. FEE WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. ROSA LACAYO HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: MARY E. WISS, CLERK: E. BURA, REPORTER: SUSAN LEE, #4280 (D206)
